rules.name: distinguishability and asymmetry
assumptions: a != b is retained (master core root)
rules.statement: a!=b is retained as a distinction; the distinction is asymmetric, giving an ordering direction.
forbidden_claims: this is a physical spacetime event
this asserts a real observer

rules.name: ordered transitions and retention
rules.statement: The asymmetric ordering yields ordered transitions with a positive retention time tau_c>0.
forbidden_claims: tau_c is a measured physical relaxation time
tau_c is calibrated to SI seconds

rules.name: discrete ticks and finite causal operator
rules.statement: Retention discretizes into ticks t=n*Delta_theta; the finite causal graph and retention operator L_R are built on those ticks, stepped by MQ.08.
forbidden_claims: L_R is a physical Hamiltonian
the stepper reproduces real dynamics

rules.name: telegraph coarse-grain and finite front speed
rules.statement: Coarse-graining the stepper gives a telegraph process with finite front speed v=sqrt(D/tau_c), derived from finite retention, not inserted.
forbidden_claims: v equals the physical speed of light c
v is empirically measured

rules.name: finite causal cone
rules.statement: The finite front speed bounds a causal cone |x|<=v*t.
forbidden_claims: this cone is the physical light cone

rules.name: null coordinates on the cone
rules.statement: Define null coordinates n_+ = v*t+x, n_- = v*t-x from the cone's own two edges.
forbidden_claims: these are imported Minkowski null coordinates

rules.name: cone product invariant candidate
rules.statement: Q_v = n_+ * n_- = v^2 t^2 - x^2, composed from the cone's own null edges, not an imported interval.
forbidden_claims: Q_v is the physical Minkowski interval

rules.name: O1 path-additivity gate
assumptions: observer map B is defined on cone displacements
rules.statement: B(delta1+delta2)=B(delta1)+B(delta2) is imposed and forces linearity of B over Q (derived, not separately assumed).
forbidden_claims: B is assumed linear a priori

rules.name: O2 cone-preservation gate
rules.statement: The observer map B must send the cone to itself (preserve |x|<=v*t under the map).
forbidden_claims: cone preservation alone fixes the map uniquely

rules.name: O3 orientation gate
rules.statement: The observer map B preserves the forward/backward orientation of the cone.
forbidden_claims: orientation preservation is a physical causality proof

rules.name: O4 RD-neutrality gate
assumptions: pure observer change carries no RD-cell creation/destruction
rules.statement: A pure observer change preserves the RD causal-cell count n_+ * n_- (Q_v). This is the one new internal gate added by this closure; it is proposed, not derived from the root backbone.
forbidden_claims: O4 is proved from RB-P0..RB-P4
O4 is a theorem
O4 is empirically confirmed

coq_backing.status: green, signature-foundation ONLY -- OA-06 stays PROPOSED_INTERNAL_GATE (tier unchanged)
coq_backing.note: The Lorentzian SIGNATURE foundation underneath the RD-neutrality gate is Coq-green. This does NOT upgrade Gamma_R or the transforms (OA-07..OA-12) -- those remain [Proposed internal bridge]; nothing in the DB derives Gamma_R root-natively (InfoLorentzInvariance secretly imports Minkowski -- refused, see PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md).

rules.name: forced null rescaling (kappa parametrization)
rules.statement: O4 forces n_+' = kappa^-1 * n_+, n_-' = kappa * n_-, kappa>0, so that Q_v'=Q_v automatically.
forbidden_claims: kappa is a physically measured boost parameter

rules.name: Gamma_R from kappa and relative velocity
rules.statement: Relative velocity beta=u/v; kappa^2=(1+beta)/(1-beta); Gamma_R=(kappa+1/kappa)/2=1/sqrt(1-beta^2). Exact witness: v=5/4,u=3/4 -> beta=3/5, kappa=2, Gamma_R=5/4.
forbidden_claims: Gamma_R is the physical Lorentz factor of special relativity
beta is a measured velocity ratio to c
this is proven physics

rules.name: observer coordinate transforms
rules.statement: x'=Gamma_R*(x-u*t), t'=Gamma_R*(t-u*x/v^2). Exact witness: event (t=8,x=5) -> (t'=7,x'=-5/4); Q_v=Q_v'=75.
forbidden_claims: this is the physical Lorentz transformation
c is derived here

rules.name: time dilation and length contraction (kinematic consequences)
rules.statement: t'/t=1/Gamma_R and L=L_0/Gamma_R follow from OA-09 with no new law inserted.
forbidden_claims: real clocks or rulers are shown to dilate/contract

rules.name: relative simultaneity
rules.statement: Delta t' = -Gamma_R * u * Delta x / v^2 follows from OA-09 with no new law inserted.
forbidden_claims: this is a claim about real simultaneous physical events

rules.name: velocity composition
rules.statement: u_21=(u1+u2)/(1+u1*u2/v^2) follows from OA-09; exact witness stays sub-cone (|u21|<v).
forbidden_claims: this proves a real speed limit on physical velocities

rules.name: operator-to-metric readout
assumptions: master core Face 8 base (operator->metric direction only)
rules.statement: g^ij ~= 1/2 * Hess(sigma_LR), the retention operator's principal symbol read as a metric. This direction carries the master core's [Th_coqc] base tier (Face 8). The reverse direction (spectrum-alone -> metric) is explicitly forbidden.
forbidden_claims: spectrum alone determines the metric
this is a general covariant metric theory
the reverse readout direction is also Th_coqc

coq_backing.note: Closes the named 'isolated islands' gap (RDL_GammaSpectral.energy <-> RDL_MetricReadout.qform) -- axiom-free, root-native (weighted-graph Dirichlet form + L_R Hessian only). See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: finite-basis covariance and minimal closed state
rules.statement: The geometry-only quotient Theta lacks the variables to close on its own (Theta_{n+1} depends on Phi,Psi, not Theta alone); the minimal closed state is Z_n=(Phi_n,Phi_{n-1},Psi_n,Psi_{n-1},Theta_n). Basis covariance under this minimal state is only PARTIALLY closed.
forbidden_claims: full basis-independent covariance is established
Theta alone is a closed geometric quotient

rules.name: discrete connection
rules.statement: U_{j<-i} = V_j^-1 * V_i from the basis-change identity; transport defect o_{i->j} = phi_j - U_{j<-i}*phi_i.
forbidden_claims: this is a Levi-Civita or physical gauge connection

coq_backing.note: Connection from a frame field, pure-gauge-is-flat, genuine non-coboundary curvature -- no continuum/manifold import; re-verified locally (coqc -q -R . DQG, axiom-grep clean). See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: curvature certificate
rules.statement: Loop transport U_C = U_C(loop) - I defines curvature K_C: local transports failing to commute (finite witness: U_x=[[1,1],[0,1]], U_y=[[1,0],[1,1]] => U_C=[[0,1],[-1,3]], K_C=[[-1,1],[-1,2]] != 0).
forbidden_claims: K_C is the physical Riemann curvature tensor
this witness generalizes beyond the two given matrices without re-derivation

coq_backing.note: Discrete Riemann = second finite difference, with a nonzero witness; supporting theorems close the discrete geometry chain (metric-compatibility, 2nd Bianchi, Gauss-Bonnet, pair symmetry, rational SO(3) curvature). Re-verified locally, axiom-grep clean. See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: free-path obstruction minimizer
rules.statement: Free path selects O(P)=sum_e o_e^T G_j o_e minimal; witness phi_i=[1,0], phi_f=[1,1]: path x->y obstruction 0, path y->x obstruction 1, minimizer selects x->y.
forbidden_claims: this is a physical geodesic equation
this reproduces real particle trajectories

rules.name: geometry-field feedback commuting square
rules.statement: The geometry-field feedback loop closes as a time-unrolled DAG (not circular), satisfying q_LG o F_full = F_LG o q_LG, with a shared singular fail-state perp_singular.
forbidden_claims: this is a dynamic metric-source field law
this closure is checked against real measured data

rules.name: observer-normalization / redshift / lapse quotient
rules.statement: CLOSED in v0.2 by the Null-Transport Factorization Gate: the local causal-cell rate relates to a remote record rate via the internal lapse N=sqrt(det B) (dtheta_i = N dtheta_o, nu_o = N nu_i), with no named metric inserted as a premise.
forbidden_claims: a physical redshift or physical lapse relation has been derived
N is the lapse of a real physical metric
this is the gravitational redshift of real physics

rules.name: null-transport factorization (internal lapse N and relative-observer factor chi)
rules.statement: The diagonal cone map B=diag(a,b) factors uniquely as B=N*diag(chi^-1,chi), with N=sqrt(ab)=sqrt(det B) (the internal LAPSE) and chi=sqrt(b/a) (relative-observer factor). Pure observer change => det B=1 => N=1; geometry-dependent readout => N=sqrt(det B). Exact witness: a=2,b=8 => det B=16, N=4, chi=2.
forbidden_claims: N is the lapse of a real physical metric
this is a real spacetime lapse function
B is shown to be the physical observer transformation of general relativity

rules.name: redshift as relative retained-step rate
rules.statement: On a stationary path, dtheta_i = N_{i|o} dtheta_o (theta = retained transition count), so nu_o = N nu_i and dtheta_o = dtheta_i / N. No external light/gravity/metric law is used; 'frequency shift' here means relative retained-step rate only.
forbidden_claims: this equals the gravitational redshift of real physics
nu is a physically measured frequency
this is derived from any named metric

rules.name: lapse composition and normalization holonomy
rules.statement: Determinants multiply under composition of diagonal observer maps, so N_{j|o}=N_{j|i}*N_{i|o}, and N_P=product of N_e along a path P. Around a loop C, the normalization holonomy H_N(C)=product of N_e over the loop is the scalar side of curvature. Exact witness: B_{i|o}=diag(2,8) (N=4), B_{j|i}=diag(3,27) (N=9), composed B_{j|o}=diag(6,216) (det=1296, N=36=9*4).
forbidden_claims: H_N(C) is a physical holonomy of a real connection
this is the Riemann curvature tensor

rules.name: horizon as rank-loss boundary, N=0 (finite, not infinity)
rules.statement: N=0 iff det B=0, a finite rank-loss boundary of the observer map (not a statement involving infinity). At N=0 the translation B has no inverse; the exterior cannot reconstruct the interior. Clone/agency-horizon connects here as a READOUT equivalence only. Exact witness: B_h=diag(0,5), det=0, N=0, singular (no inverse).
forbidden_claims: this is a real black-hole event horizon
N=0 asserts a physical singularity
this proves anything about real spacetime causal structure

rules.name: Unruh-fix: kappa_R as an internally normalized readout of a_local
rules.statement: From the DeclaredFormula tau_c^(U)=pi*c/a_local, a_local=pi*c/tau_c^(U). The observer reads a_o = N_{i|o} * a_local; at the horizon, kappa_R := lim_{i->H} N_{i|o} a_local(i), if finite. CORRECT STATUS: a_local != kappa_R directly, but kappa_R = Normalize_N(a_local); 'surface gravity' requires EXTERNAL semantic calibration -- only the INTERNAL bridge (kappa_R as a normalized readout of a_local) is repaired here, not the physical identification. Exact witness: a_local=7/2, N=4 => kappa_R=14, finite, kappa_R != a_local.
forbidden_claims: kappa_R is physical surface gravity
this derives Hawking/Unruh temperature
a_local is shown equal to kappa_R
this promotes OC-04 to a derived theorem

rules.name: graph front-speed vs measured-speed correspondence
rules.statement: The graph front-speed v is declared (not derived) as playing the role a measured propagation speed would play; the identification with any specific physical speed is not established.
forbidden_claims: v is shown equal to the physical speed of light c
this correspondence is derived rather than declared

rules.name: mass-memory declared correspondence
rules.statement: Retention memory is declared (not derived) as playing a mass-like role; no mass-energy law is derived from the root.
forbidden_claims: mass is derived from retention
this is E=mc^2

rules.name: Schwarzschild calculator identity
assumptions: calculator identity only, same tier as the core gateway
rules.statement: r_s = 2*G*E/c^4, admitted only as a declared calculator identity, not a derived theorem of this domain.
forbidden_claims: r_s is derived here
this proves a physical event horizon exists

rules.name: Unruh calculator identity
assumptions: calculator identity only, same tier as the core gateway
rules.statement: tau_c = pi*c/a, admitted only as a declared calculator identity, not a derived theorem of this domain.
forbidden_claims: tau_c=pi*c/a is derived from RB-P1..RB-P4
this proves real Unruh radiation

rules.name: complete horizon/redshift bridge and dynamic metric-source closure
rules.statement: CLOSED in v0.2: the horizon half by GC-04 (N=0 <=> det B=0, finite rank-loss boundary) plus GC-05 (Unruh-fix internal bridge kappa_R=Normalize_N(a_local)); the metric-source half by the Geometry Stationarity Gate (GD-01..GD-04), a source/record field Psi driving a Theta-evolution that passes a commuting square AND has a failing control case (exact fixture Theta_{n+1}=3/8, R_Theta=0; failing control Theta_wrong=7/8, R_Theta=1 != 0).
forbidden_claims: a physical horizon bridge has been derived
a physical metric-source field law has been derived
this is a real black-hole event horizon
this is the Einstein field equations
S_Theta is the physical stress-energy tensor
g is the real metric of the universe

rules.name: geometry source S_Theta = Phi^T G_a Psi
rules.statement: Since G[Theta]=G_0+sum_a Theta^a G_a, dG/dTheta^a=G_a. The geometry source is S_Theta,n^a = Phi_n^T G_a Psi_n -- reader x record changing the operator geometry reads. This is NOT posited as energy/mass/stress. Exact witness: G_1=[[0,1],[1,0]], Phi_n=[1,0], Psi_n=[0,1] => S_Theta=1.
forbidden_claims: S_Theta is the physical stress-energy tensor
S_Theta is energy or mass
this is derived from any named field-theory Lagrangian

coq_backing.status: green, PARTIAL joint -- tier unchanged (stays FINITE_DIAGNOSTIC)
coq_backing.note: Closes ONE joint of the feedback (strain/edge budget) as a single closed unit with GD-03, root-native, no stress-energy import. Does NOT close the full metric-source law (GD-04 remains open). See PROVENANCE_CAUSAL_QG.md.

rules.name: geometry stationarity law and explicit Theta stepper
assumptions: S_closed = S_DRL + retained-difference cost of Theta
rules.statement: The living-geometry state Theta obeys the same retained-action grammar as the rest of the root: S_closed = S_DRL + sum_n [(1/2 dt) dTheta_n^T M_Theta dTheta_n - dt U_Theta(Theta_n)]. Stationarity in Theta gives M_Theta d^2_t Theta_n + grad U_Theta(Theta_n) + K S_Theta,n = 0, with explicit stepper Theta_{n+1}=2 Theta_n - Theta_{n-1} - dt^2 M_Theta^-1 [grad U_Theta(Theta_n) + K S_Theta,n]. Exact fixture (Theta_{n-1}=0, Theta_n=1/2, M_Theta=2, K=1, dt=1, U_Theta=Theta^2/4) with S_Theta=1 gives Theta_{n+1}=3/8 and action residual R_Theta=0. Then G_{n+1}=G[Theta_{n+1}] and g_{n+1}^ij=(1/2) Hess sigma_{G[Theta_{n+1}]} -- operator->metric only, spectrum-alone still forbidden.
forbidden_claims: this is a new field equation family
this is the Einstein field equations
g is the real metric of the universe
the reverse spectrum-alone->metric readout is licensed here

rules.name: minimal closed state Z_n and commuting square (time-unrolled DAG)
rules.statement: The minimal closed state is Z_n=(Phi_n,Phi_{n-1},Psi_n,Psi_{n-1},Theta_n,Theta_{n-1}); Z_{n+1}=F_MSG(Z_n). The commuting square q_MSG o F_full = F_MSG o q_MSG holds, but the metric-only quotient q_g LACKS the variables to close alone -- two states with equal metric but different Phi, Psi, Theta_{n-1} give different next metrics. Time-unrolled, this is a DAG, not circular.
forbidden_claims: Theta or the metric alone is a closed quotient
this closure is checked against real measured data
this is a proof of general covariance

rules.name: geometry stationarity fail rules
rules.statement: Four named fail states for the geometry stationarity gate: FAIL_GEOMETRY_PIVOT (det M_Theta=0 / low pivot), FAIL_METRIC_ADMISSIBILITY (bad-signature/degenerate metric), FAIL_NULL_MIXING (null edges mixed into a stationary claim), HORIZON_BOUNDARY (lapse=0, ties to GC-04). No silent regularization; no inverse computed across a horizon.
forbidden_claims: these fail states are exhaustive of all possible real-physics failure modes
a fail state triggering proves anything about real spacetime
